However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this facade, which is thick enough to build an aircraft carrier: although it has 5 million in paid-in capital, the insured headcount is an extremely feeble 2 people! The logical deduction instantly stripped away its heavy-industry base illusion: inside a certain unit (Room 102) on the 1st floor of Liandong U Valley, a standard factory/R&D park, 2 bosses or engineers holding 5 million in funds claim to have built a 'radar and motor manufacturing plant' requiring military qualifications, anechoic chambers, and heavy assembly lines? The truth is extremely clear and possesses hardcore technical attributes: this is a 100% genuine 2-Employee Light-Asset Control System Design Team & Equipment Proxy (a micro R&D entity focusing on automatic control systems and motor software design). The boss is a technical professional with certain financial strength. These 2 people in the 1st-floor office take on software and system integration jobs, such as writing control code or creating system schemes for external motors or instruments. The so-called 'radar and motor manufacturing' is either a pie drawn for the future or purely intended to obtain paper qualifications as a 'manufacturer' in certain military or large equipment bids; the actual hardware relies entirely on outsourced OEM or procurement.
